name: stackra/geography
purpose: Global reference catalog + IP geolocation — wraps nnjeim/world with Country, State, City, Currency, Language, Timezone models plus MaxMind GeoLite2 resolver.
capabilities: IP geolocation via MaxMind GeoLite2 + ip-api.com fallback
when_to_use: Any signup, marketing page, or tenant UI needs country/currency/language/timezone lookups, or resolves an IP to a location.
when_not_to_use: For tenant-selected preferred locale management, use stackra/localization which chains through to this catalog.
